hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\", d.get(\"new_string\", \"\").split(\"\\n\")[0]))"); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "Formatted: $FILE"; fi'
bash -c 'if [ -f tsconfig.json ]; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20; fi'
